era: Active. Punk. E=7 -- garage punk, raw, self-released. Most underground entry in 281-284 block. Seattle.
associated_musicians: The Sonics (Pacific Northwest garage punk tradition, degree 268)

theory_nodes.concept: Maximum DIY: self-released after three label-supported degrees (281: Kill Rock Stars, 282-283: Hardly Art). No distribution infrastructure, no promotional machine, no label percentage. The fundamental punk act: make music, release it yourself.
theory_nodes.description: Veronica Lipgloss as the underground pole of the 281-284 block.

theory_nodes.concept: Band name subversion: Veronica Lipgloss sounds like a teen novel character, not a punk band. The gap between the feminine-coded name register and the garage punk content register is itself a punk strategy.
theory_nodes.description: Name as subversion: feminine-coded surface, garage punk content.

theory_nodes.concept: 281-284 block: four modes of Seattle women's punk. Wimps(281) sardonic/E=6 → Tacocat(282) warm/E=7 → Childbirth(283) dark/E=7 → Veronica Lipgloss(284) raw/E=7. Block closure. The feminist punk spectrum is not monolithic.
theory_nodes.description: Block closure: four modes, four institutional contexts, E=6→7→7→7 arc.

cross_references.relationship: E=7, Hardly Art. The label-supported preceding degree. Veronica Lipgloss is its underground mirror: same energy, zero institutional support. The contrast is the point.
E=6, Kill Rock Stars. Other woman-fronted Seattle punk in the block. Different mode (deadpan vs. garage), different energy (6 vs. 7), different label (Kill Rock Stars vs. self). Block range visible.
Original Pacific Northwest garage punk (Tacoma). The Sonics tradition that Veronica Lipgloss continues at degree 284, 16 degrees later. Garage punk in the PNW is a continuous tradition.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 + E=7 = E=14. California Sea Lion: urban waterfront, dock haul-out, bark cacophony. The most familiar, least exotic of the marine mammal sounds in the arc -- unceremonious, doing its thing in the available urban space. Veronica Lipgloss: unceremonious, most underground, doing its thing in the available punk space. Both E=7, both without grandeur, both exactly themselves.
